data.title: Shares of eBay Rise on Report of GameStop Deal Interest — WSJ
data.description:
By WSJ Staff

Shares of eBay rose about 10% in afterhours trading Friday after The Wall Street Journal reported that GameStop has been quietly building a stake in the company's shares ahead of a potential offer. GameStop could submit an offer for eBay as soon as later this month, people familiar with the matter told the Journal. GameStop, which has a market value of around $12 billion, would be taking a big bite to digest eBay, whose market value was recently about $46 billion.

This item is part of a Wall Street Journal live coverage event. The full stream can be found by searching P/WSJL (WSJ Live Coverage).

data.title: NexMetals Mining to Hold Virtual AGM May 27; Seeks Omnibus Plan, Director Elections
data.description:
NexMetals Mining announced virtual annual meeting on May 27, 2026 and circulated proxy materials including election of eight directors and Omnibus Plan approval.

Key Highlights:

  • Issued Notice of AGM, management information circular, form of proxy and financial statement request via SEDAR+ on April 30, 2026.
  • Virtual AGM set for May 27, 2026 at 9:00 a.m. Vancouver time; record date April 22, 2026; 35,648,164 common shares outstanding.
  • Shareholders to vote on election of eight directors, appointment of MNP LLP as auditor, and approval of the Omnibus equity incentive plan.
  • Board unanimously recommends shareholders vote FOR director elections, auditor appointment and Omnibus Plan resolution.
  • Disclosed executive compensation framework, NEO list, outstanding awards and recent executive terminations and consulting arrangements (e.g., Lekstrom, Rawlins).

Original SEC Filing: NexMetals Mining Corp. [ NEXM ] - 8-K - May. 01, 2026

Disclaimer

data.title: Helio Reaches $879,163 Debt Settlement With Sean Wolf, Sets Leak-Out Stock Sales
data.description:
Helio entered a settlement agreement with Sean Wolf on April 27, 2026 to resolve $879,163 outstanding under two 9.75% promissory notes from October 2024. The amount will be repaid from net proceeds of Wolf’s sales of Helio common stock under leak-out limits and any direct company payments. Wolf may sell up to the greater of 4,000 shares (when daily volume is at least 20,000 shares) or 12% of daily volume, with a block cap of 2,000 shares; the cap rises to 25% upon an exchange uplisting or on July 5, 2026. Helio will facilitate legend removal and broker processing to enable sales, and proceeds will reduce the balance until satisfied.

Agreement details:

  • Agreement type: Debt settlement agreement resolving two promissory notes with leak-out stock sale terms
  • Counterparty: Sean Wolf
  • Signed / Effective: Apr 27 2026 / same
  • Duration / Termination: Until Settlement Amount is repaid
  • Reason: Resolve notes and manage repayment via controlled stock sales

Original SEC Filing: Helio Corp /FL/ [ HLEO ] - 8-K - May. 01, 2026

Disclaimer
This is an AI-powered summary. It may contain inaccuracies. Consider verifying important information with the source. Please note this summary is solely based on documents filed with the SEC.

data.title: HNO International Secures Up to $30 Million Equity Purchase Facility With Lambda Ventures
data.description:
HNO International entered two related financing agreements with Lambda Ventures to bolster liquidity. The company secured an Equity Purchase Agreement providing up to $30 million over 24 months, with puts between $25,000 and the lesser of $500,000 or 200% of Average Daily Trading Value, priced at a 20% discount to the lowest traded price during specified periods. HNO will issue 500,000 initial commitment shares and additional shares upon each $2.5 million funding milestone, and cover $10,000 of investor counsel fees. A companion Registration Rights Agreement requires HNO to file within 30 days and secure effectiveness within 90 days for the resale of all shares issued under the facility, supporting execution of the financing program.

Agreement 1: HNO International Secures Up to $30 Million Equity Purchase Facility With Lambda Ventures

  • Agreement type: Equity Purchase Agreement for up to $30 million equity line
  • Counterparty: Lambda Ventures
  • Signed / Effective: Apr 27 2026 / same
  • Duration / Termination: 24 months
  • Reason: Enhance liquidity and financial flexibility

Agreement 2: HNO International Signs Registration Rights Pact to Register Shares Issued Under $30M Facility

  • Agreement type: Registration Rights Agreement for resale of shares under equity line
  • Counterparty: Lambda Ventures
  • Signed / Effective: Apr 27 2026 / same
  • Reason: Enable resale registration to support financing program

Original SEC Filing: HNO International, Inc. [ HNOI ] - 8-K - May. 01, 2026

Disclaimer

data.title: DevvStream Raises $250,000 Via Pre-Funded Warrants Sold to Helena Partners

The warrants are immediately exercisable at $0.0001 per share with no expiration and include beneficial ownership caps of 4.99% (or up to 9.99% at the investor’s election). data.title: Biotricity Creates Series C, Swaps Into 1.96M Shares; Converts to 59.6% After $15M Raise
data.description:
Biotricity entered into exchange agreements with certain holders to swap 14.1 million common shares plus options and warrants into 1,957,297 shares of newly created Series C Preferred Stock at a 10-for-1 ratio. Each Series C share carries 40 votes and will automatically convert into 59.6% of Biotricity's outstanding common stock upon a qualified equity financing of at least $15 million, with matching warrant coverage if issued in that financing. If no qualified financing occurs by March 31, 2028, each Series C share is convertible into 10 common shares. The move is intended to streamline the capital structure and align stakeholders ahead of potential financing.

Agreement details:

  • Agreement type: Exchange agreements and Certificate of Designation for Series C Preferred Stock
  • Counterparty: Exchange Holders
  • Signed / Effective: May 01 2026 / May 01 2026
  • Duration / Termination: At will
  • Reason: Strengthen capital structure ahead of potential financing

Original SEC Filing: BIOTRICITY INC. [ BTCY ] - 8-K - May. 01, 2026

Disclaimer

data.title: GameStop preparing offer for eBay, WSJ reports
data.description:
GameStop is preparing to make an offer for eBAY , the Wall Street Journal reported on Friday, citing people familiar with the matter.

Shares of eBay, which has a market capitalization of about $46 billion, were up about 9% in extended trading on Friday.

Shares of GameStop, which has a market capitalization of nearly $12 billion, were up about 3%.

GameStop has been quietly building a stake in eBay's shares ahead of a potential offer, the report said. It could submit an offer for eBay as soon as later this month.

GameStop and eBay did not immediately respond to Reuters' requests for comment.

data.title: Roper Technologies 1Q 2026: Revenue $2.1B, EPS $4.87— 10-Q Summary
data.description:
Roper Technologies reported first-quarter 2026 results with net revenues of $2.1B, net earnings of $508.9M and diluted EPS of $4.87, reflecting year‑over‑year revenue growth and higher profitability versus the prior-year quarter.

Financial Highlights

MetricCurrent quarterPrior year quarterYoY change
Revenue¹$2.1B$1.88B11.3%
Net income²$508.9M$331.1M53.7%
Diluted EPS³$4.87$3.0659.2%

¹ Reported as “Net revenues”. ² Reported as “Net earnings”. ³ Reported as “Diluted earnings per share”.

Business Highlights

  • Revenue growth of 11.3% was driven by strength in Application and Network Software.
  • Organic revenue rose about 5.6% companywide, led by legal, education, freight match and medical businesses.
  • Acquisitions completed in 2025 — including CentralReach, Subsplash and Convoy — materially contributed to revenue and backlog.
  • Improved gross margins and software leverage offset product-margin pressure from medical consumables and water meter mix.
  • Backlog increased 11.8% to $3,392.1M; SaaS renewal timing affected deferred revenue and working capital.

Original SEC Filing: ROPER TECHNOLOGIES INC [ ROP ] - 10-Q - May. 01, 2026

data.title: U.S. Dips Into Oil Reserves as Iran War Enters Its Third Month — Barrons.com
data.description:
This commentary was issued recently by money managers, research firms, and market newsletter writers and has been edited by Barron's.

Energy Stresses Grow

Commodities Focus NDR Ned Davis Research May 1: Total U.S. petroleum inventories, comprising gasoline, middle distillates, and jet fuel and including the SPR [Strategic Petroleum Reserve] and all refined products, are just above 1.6 billion barrels. Aggregate stocks have risen steadily over the past two years and are now up 2.1% year over year and 1% above levels at the time of the U.S. strike on Iranian nuclear facilities last June.

Despite the U.S.'s energy-independent status and no clear signs of shortages, U.S. inventory data point to broadening system stress as the [Iran] conflict moves into its third month and the effective closure of Hormuz continues.

As part of the planned 172 million barrel draw, the SPR fell 7.1 million barrels last week, the largest weekly decline since October 2022. Including commercial inventories, total U.S. petroleum stocks declined by 13.3 million barrels on the week.

Matt Bauer

About Those Fed Dissents...

Sevens Report Kinsale Trading May 1: Wednesday's Federal Open Market Committee meeting saw the highest number of dissents among voting FOMC members since 1992, leaving the market with limited conviction as to which direction the Fed will move policy rates in the coming months and quarters. Case in point, federal-funds futures have priced back in risks of rate hikes in 2027 (17.5% odds).

Monetary policy uncertainty, by itself, isn't a bearish game changer that will derail the latest leg of this historic, respect-worthy stock market rally. But markets prefer to have a good idea of what lies ahead, particularly with regard to monetary policy, and the prior consensus view that the Fed is "on hold" for now with the eventual next change to policy rates being a rate cut, not a hike, is poised to be challenged by the latest run-hot economy showing up in the latest "hard data" reports.

And while a run-hot economy is widely preferred over either stagflation or sudden contraction, the uncertainty regarding rate policy will leave the risks of relatively violent bouts of market volatility increasingly elevated as we continue to navigate 2026.

Tom Essaye

MSFT/OpenAI: Less Entwined

Equity Strategy Evercore ISI April 28: Microsoft's partnership with OpenAI combined funding, infrastructure, revenue sharing, and exclusivity to help OpenAI scale while giving Microsoft distribution/monetization advantages. The relationship is being restructured — loosening exclusivity, reducing revenue share — to enable multi-cloud access, improve OpenAI's economics, and shift the relationship to one where both companies remain aligned while increasingly competing.

For the AI ecosystem, Nvidia's new high on Monday is a vote for broader end-market access [and] accelerated enterprise adoption, all driving increased demand for AI infrastructure.

Julian Emanuel and team

Sizing Up the Consumer

The Weekly Five Northern Trust April 27: What are we learning about consumer trends during earnings season? In spite of the often very different spending patterns between affluent and mass-market consumers, we are seeing broad consumer strength.

First, we are seeing ongoing spending from higher-income consumers. American Express emphasized that card spend adjusted for foreign exchange was up 9%, representing "the highest quarterly growth in three years, driven by strong demand and engagement with...premium products." Credit trends in its core client base remain strong, and this sentiment is consistent with what we have heard from other card issuers.

For example, Capital One, which caters to a less affluent core customer, also noted strong credit performance in its earnings this week.

Eric Freedman

Earnings' Positive Message

The Pulse of the Market RBC Capital Markets April 27: Three things stuck out to us in our review of earnings calls last week: outlooks that emphasized resiliency but contained a dose of caution, the conversation on Iran war impacts (present and future) getting under way, and descriptions of cautious but stable consumers. Second, with U.S. equities breaking out to a new 2026 high relative to non-U.S. equities, we note that valuations suggest there is room for this trade to run and that weak earnings-revisions breadth isn't a problem unique to the U.S.

Third, funds flows are shifting back to financials and growth, which makes sense from a valuation and earnings growth perspective.

Lori Calvasina

Behind the VC Boom

Investment Strategy Wells Fargo Investment Institute April 27: Venture capital deal activity surged in the first quarter of 2026, reaching a record $267 billion after several years of relatively muted volumes. Artificial intelligence continues to dominate the landscape, with AI and machine-learning companies accounting for more than 89% of total deal value. This share has steadily increased over recent years, underscoring AI's growing influence across the market.

However, a closer look reveals that this headline number masks some underlying weakness. The record quarter was driven largely by a small number of extremely large transactions. The five biggest deals alone represented approximately $196 billion of total deal value.

This unusually narrow concentration in the first quarter suggests that much of the broader venture-capital market remains in a very slow recovery mode outside of these mega deals.

Mark Steffen

To be considered for this section, material, with the author's name and address, should be sent to MarketWatch@barrons.com.

This content was created by Barron's, which is operated by Dow Jones & Co. Barron's is published independently from Dow Jones Newswires and The Wall Street Journal.

data.description:
Eightco Holdings entered into an amended and restated consulting agreement with Worldcoin Tower to expand its mandate to a Strategic Asset Strategy covering digital asset accumulation and new strategic investments in emerging companies. data.title: PSKY Stock Breaks Six-Day Losing Streak After Morgan Stanley’s Double Upgrade
data.description:
Key points:
  • Morgan Stanley raised PSKY price target to $14 from $11.
  • PSKY snaps six-day losing streak.
  • Three analysts rate the stock ‘buy’, 11 rate ‘hold’ and six ‘sell’ as per data from Koyfin.

Paramount Skydance (PSKY) share price jumped 8% on Friday following a double upgrade from Morgan Stanley and a price target hike.

Morgan Stanley analyst Sean Diffley upgraded the stock to ‘Overweight’ from ‘Underweight’ and upgraded the share price target to $14 from $11 per share. The proposed acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) presents a “big, bold, and game-changing move according to Diffley.

“Pessimism presents an opportunity as the Warner deal is transformative and AI can turbocharge legacy assets,” said Diffley, who sees a "clear synergy and de-levering path."

In late February, Paramount won a legal battle with Netflix to buy Warner Bros., the parent company of HBO Max, which owns some of the world's best movie intellectual properties, including Game of Thrones, Harry Potter, and The Lord of the Rings. The $81 billion merger is expected to close in the third quarter, but is subject to regulatory approval.

While Diffley described the double upgrade as Morgan Stanley’s “riskiest and most out-of-consensus call”, he pointed out that there are several underappreciated elements of the Warner Bros. acquisition.

Paramount can save more than $6 billion, or about 11% of operating expenses, through consolidation with Warner Bros., according to Diffey, giving Paramount a way to grow its streaming and studio assets faster.

However, Morgan Stanley acknowledged that there are regulatory hurdles to the completion of the deal, and the upgrade is “contingent on approval.”

PSKY Retail View 

Retail sentiment on Stocktwits was ‘normal’ with ‘normal’ message volumes.

One user was bullish on the stock and suggested an upcoming bull run.

https://stocktwits.com/thedude311/message/652051878

The stock has lost 17.2% year-to-date.

data.title: Lunai Bioworks Disclosed Failure to Satisfy a Continued Listing Rule or Standard
data.description:
On April 20, 2026, Nasdaq's Hearings Panel set deadlines for the company to regain compliance with the $2.5 million stockholders' equity rule by April 27, 2026 and the $1.00 bid price rule by June 1, 2026 (extensions requested to May 1 and June 4, respectively). The company completed a merger on May 1, 2026 intended to restore equity compliance and is awaiting the Panel's formal determination, while bid-price compliance remains outstanding. A February 6, 2026 Staff determination to delist remains stayed pending the Panel's decision.

Original SEC Filing: Lunai Bioworks Inc. [ LNAI ] - 8-K - May. 01, 2026

data.title: Lunai Bioworks Acquires Neurobridge IP in Stock Deal, Issuing $20M Series B Preferred
data.description:
Lunai Bioworks entered into an Agreement and Plan of Merger to acquire Neurobridge IP Holdings, obtaining a multi-jurisdictional CNS-focused patent portfolio. The all-stock deal closed on May 1, 2026, with Lunai issuing eight shares of Series B Convertible Preferred Stock carrying an aggregate stated value of $20 million to Oncotelic and Pelerin. The preferred shares are non-voting, pay no dividends, and convert to common stock at $1.50 per share only after required stockholder approval. Management expects the acquisition to expand IP assets for CNS programs while supporting Nasdaq equity compliance efforts.

Agreement details:

  • Agreement type: Agreement and Plan of Merger (stock-for-assets via triangular merger)
  • Counterparty: Neurobridge IP Holdings; Oncotelic; Pelerin Therapeutics
  • Signed / Effective: Apr 27 2026 / May 01 2026
  • Reason: Acquire CNS patent portfolio and bolster equity position

Original SEC Filing: Lunai Bioworks Inc. [ LNAI ] - 8-K - May. 01, 2026

Disclaimer

data.title: Comfort Systems USA posts investor presentation showing $2.87B YTD revenue, $524M adjusted EBITDA (Q1 2026)
data.description:
Comfort Systems USA posted an investor presentation showing YTD 2026 revenue of $2,865.3M and Adjusted EBITDA of $524.4M.

Key Highlights:

  • Posted investor presentation on May 1, 2026 for analysts and investors, furnished as Exhibit 99.1.
  • YTD 2026 revenue $2,865.3M and YTD gross profit $754.4M; Adjusted EBITDA for the three months ended Mar 31, 2026 was $524.4M.
  • Backlog grew to $12,455M as of Q1 2026, reflecting strong contracted work pipeline.
  • Financial strength: $1.05B cash, $39.1M total debt, Debt/TTM EBITDA = 0.02 and $1.10B senior credit facility.
  • Highlights strategic focus areas: modular construction, technology/data centers, life sciences, service growth and sustainability initiatives.

Original SEC Filing: COMFORT SYSTEMS USA INC [ FIX ] - 8-K - May. 01, 2026
